title: Trassitan

'''Trassitan''' was an astronomical object<ref name="HNN" /> located in the [[Trassitan system/Legends|Trassitan system]], a part of the [[Veragi sector/Legends|Veragi sector]] in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The [[Veragi Trade Route/Legends|Veragi Trade Route]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] linked Trassitan to the [[Veragi system/Legends|Veragi system]] as well as the [[Dubrillion system/Legends|Dubrillion system]] in the [[Myto sector/Legends|Myto sector]].<ref name="TEA" />

By [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Dates">[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 54|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #54]] is dated to "13:5:2," which is a [[Great ReSynchronization]] date corresponding to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], per the reasoning [[:Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> an office of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Judicial Department/Legends|Judiciary]] was located on Trassitan, and it was the nearest such facility to the Veragi [[Sector/Legends|sector's]] region known as the [[Gree Enclave/Legends|Gree Enclave]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], the [[Head of State/Legends|leader]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist movement]], was spotted aboard the [[Rokak'k Baran]],<ref name="HNN" /> a massive [[Transport/Legends|transport]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] that was the main method of travel within the [[Gree (species)/Legends|Gree]] Enclave.<ref name="TGE">{{JournalCite|8|The Gree Enclave}}</ref> A [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] in the area subsequently forwarded a report of the sighting to the Judiciary office on Trassitan.<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Trassitan was first mentioned in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 54|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #54'']], an installment of the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News]] website<ref name="HNN" /> released on [[May 2]], [[2002]].<ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6682683|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-05-02|time=5:53 PM|archivedate=20200305125429}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Trassitan [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body Trassitan, in grid square L-3.<ref name="TEA" />
